description: You are a Robotics Engineer preparing manufacturing documentation for a machining shop. Create a 2D engineering drawing package from the FreeCAD model at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd. The drawing must include front, right-side, and top orthographic views, an isometric or auxiliary view, and at least 6 critical dimension annotations covering overall envelope dimensions and key feature locations. Log in as ga / password123. Export the drawing as a PDF to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/bracket_drawing.pdf and save the updated FreeCAD document to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/bracket_drawing.FCStd.
